lines.gurmukhi: ਕੋਈ ਜਿ ਮੂਰਖੁ ਲੋਭੀਆ ਮੂਲਿ ਨ ਸੁਣੀ ਕਹਿਆ ॥੨॥
lines.translit: koee ji moorakh lobheea mool na sunee kahiaa |2|
lines.english: But he is foolish and greedy, and he never listens to what he is told. ||2||

lines.gurmukhi: ਇਕਸੁ ਦੁਹੁ ਚਹੁ ਕਿਆ ਗਣੀ ਸਭ ਇਕਤੁ ਸਾਦਿ ਮੁਠੀ ॥
lines.translit: eikas duhu chahu kiaa ganee sabh ikat saad mutthee |
lines.english: Why bother to count one, two, three, four? The whole world is defrauded by the same enticements.

lines.gurmukhi: ਇਕੁ ਅਧੁ ਨਾਇ ਰਸੀਅੜਾ ਕਾ ਵਿਰਲੀ ਜਾਇ ਵੁਠੀ ॥੩॥
lines.translit: eik adh naae raseearraa kaa viralee jaae vutthee |3|
lines.english: Hardly anyone loves the Lord's Name; how rare is that place which is in bloom. ||3||

lines.gurmukhi: ਭਗਤ ਸਚੇ ਦਰਿ ਸੋਹਦੇ ਅਨਦ ਕਰਹਿ ਦਿਨ ਰਾਤਿ ॥
lines.translit: bhagat sache dar sohade anad kareh din raat |
lines.english: The devotees look beautiful in the True Court; night and day, they are happy.

lines.gurmukhi: ਰੰਗਿ ਰਤੇ ਪਰਮੇਸਰੈ ਜਨ ਨਾਨਕ ਤਿਨ ਬਲਿ ਜਾਤ ॥੪॥੧॥੧੬੯॥
lines.translit: rang rate paramesarai jan naanak tin bal jaat |4|1|169|
lines.english: They are imbued with the Love of the Transcendent Lord; servant Nanak is a sacrifice to them. ||4||1||169||

lines.gurmukhi: ਦੁਖ ਭੰਜਨੁ ਤੇਰਾ ਨਾਮੁ ਜੀ ਦੁਖ ਭੰਜਨੁ ਤੇਰਾ ਨਾਮੁ ॥
lines.translit: dukh bhanjan teraa naam jee dukh bhanjan teraa naam |
lines.english: The Destroyer of sorrow is Your Name, Lord; the Destroyer of sorrow is Your Name.

lines.gurmukhi: ਗਉੜੀ ਮਹਲਾ ੫ ਮਾਂਝ ॥
lines.translit: gaurree mahalaa 5 maanjh |
lines.english: Gauree, Fifth Mehl, Maajh:

lines.gurmukhi: ਆਠ ਪਹਰ ਆਰਾਧੀਐ ਪੂਰਨ ਸਤਿਗੁਰ ਗਿਆਨੁ ॥੧॥ ਰਹਾਉ ॥
lines.translit: aatth pehar aaraadheeai pooran satigur giaan |1| rahaau |
lines.english: Twenty-four hours a day, dwell upon the wisdom of the Perfect True Guru. ||1||Pause||

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਿਤੁ ਘਟਿ ਵਸੈ ਪਾਰਬ੍ਰਹਮੁ ਸੋਈ ਸੁਹਾਵਾ ਥਾਉ ॥
lines.translit: jit ghatt vasai paarabraham soee suhaavaa thaau |
lines.english: That heart, in which the Supreme Lord God abides, is the most beautiful place.

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਮ ਕੰਕਰੁ ਨੇੜਿ ਨ ਆਵਈ ਰਸਨਾ ਹਰਿ ਗੁਣ ਗਾਉ ॥੧॥
lines.translit: jam kankar nerr na aavee rasanaa har gun gaau |1|
lines.english: The Messenger of Death does not even approach those who chant the Glorious Praises of the Lord with the tongue. ||1||

lines.gurmukhi: ਸੇਵਾ ਸੁਰਤਿ ਨ ਜਾਣੀਆ ਨਾ ਜਾਪੈ ਆਰਾਧਿ ॥
lines.translit: sevaa surat na jaaneea naa jaapai aaraadh |
lines.english: I have not understood the wisdom of serving Him, nor have I worshipped Him in meditation.

lines.gurmukhi: ਓਟ ਤੇਰੀ ਜਗਜੀਵਨਾ ਮੇਰੇ ਠਾਕੁਰ ਅਗਮ ਅਗਾਧਿ ॥੨॥
lines.translit: ott teree jagajeevanaa mere tthaakur agam agaadh |2|
lines.english: You are my Support, O Life of the World; O my Lord and Master, Inaccessible and Incomprehensible. ||2||

lines.gurmukhi: ਤਤੀ ਵਾਉ ਨ ਲਗਈ ਸਤਿਗੁਰਿ ਰਖੇ ਆਪਿ ॥੩॥
lines.translit: tatee vaau na lagee satigur rakhe aap |3|
lines.english: The hot winds do not even touch those who are protected by the True Guru. ||3||

lines.gurmukhi: ਭਏ ਕ੍ਰਿਪਾਲ ਗੁਸਾਈਆ ਨਠੇ ਸੋਗ ਸੰਤਾਪ ॥
lines.translit: bhe kripaal gusaaeea natthe sog santaap |
lines.english: When the Lord of the Universe became merciful, sorrow and suffering departed.

lines.gurmukhi: ਗੁਰੁ ਨਾਰਾਇਣੁ ਦਯੁ ਗੁਰੁ ਗੁਰੁ ਸਚਾ ਸਿਰਜਣਹਾਰੁ ॥
lines.translit: gur naaraaein day gur gur sachaa sirajanahaar |
lines.english: The Guru is the All-pervading Lord, the Guru is the Merciful Master; the Guru is the True Creator Lord.

lines.gurmukhi: ਗੁਰਿ ਤੁਠੈ ਸਭ ਕਿਛੁ ਪਾਇਆ ਜਨ ਨਾਨਕ ਸਦ ਬਲਿਹਾਰ ॥੪॥੨॥੧੭੦॥
lines.translit: gur tutthai sabh kichh paaeaa jan naanak sad balihaar |4|2|170|
lines.english: When the Guru was totally satisfied, I obtained everything. Servant Nanak is forever a sacrifice to Him. ||4||2||170||

lines.gurmukhi: ਹਰਿ ਰਾਮ ਰਾਮ ਰਾਮ ਰਾਮਾ ॥
lines.translit: har raam raam raam raamaa |
lines.english: The Lord, the Lord, Raam, Raam, Raam:

lines.gurmukhi: ਗਉੜੀ ਮਾਝ ਮਹਲਾ ੫ ॥
lines.translit: gaurree maajh mahalaa 5 |
lines.english: Gauree Maajh, Fifth Mehl:

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਪਿ ਪੂਰਨ ਹੋਏ ਕਾਮਾ ॥੧॥ ਰਹਾਉ ॥
lines.translit: jap pooran hoe kaamaa |1| rahaau |
lines.english: meditating on Him, all affairs are resolved. ||1||Pause||

lines.gurmukhi: ਹਰਿ ਜਸੁ ਸੁਣੀਐ ਜਿਸ ਤੇ ਸੋਈ ਭਾਈ ਮਿਤ੍ਰੁ ॥੧॥
lines.translit: har jas suneeai jis te soee bhaaee mitru |1|
lines.english: One who recites to me the Praises of the Lord is my friend and brother. ||1||

lines.gurmukhi: ਰਾਮ ਗੋਬਿੰਦ ਜਪੇਦਿਆ ਹੋਆ ਮੁਖੁ ਪਵਿਤ੍ਰੁ ॥
lines.translit: raam gobind japediaa hoaa mukh pavitru |
lines.english: Chanting the Name of the Lord of the Universe, one's mouth is sanctified.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਭਿ ਪਦਾਰਥ ਸਭਿ ਫਲਾ ਸਰਬ ਗੁਣਾ ਜਿਸੁ ਮਾਹਿ ॥
lines.translit: sabh padaarath sabh falaa sarab gunaa jis maeh |
lines.english: All treasures, all rewards and all virtues are in the Lord of the Universe.

lines.gurmukhi: ਕਿਉ ਗੋਬਿੰਦੁ ਮਨਹੁ ਵਿਸਾਰੀਐ ਜਿਸੁ ਸਿਮਰਤ ਦੁਖ ਜਾਹਿ ॥੨॥
lines.translit: kiau gobind manahu visaareeai jis simarat dukh jaeh |2|
lines.english: Why forget Him from your mind? Remembering Him in meditation, pain departs. ||2||

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਿਸੁ ਲੜਿ ਲਗਿਐ ਜੀਵੀਐ ਭਵਜਲੁ ਪਈਐ ਪਾਰਿ ॥
lines.translit: jis larr lagiai jeeveeai bhavajal peeai paar |
lines.english: Grasping the hem of His robe, we live, and cross over the terrifying world-ocean.

lines.gurmukhi: ਮਿਲਿ ਸਾਧੂ ਸੰਗਿ ਉਧਾਰੁ ਹੋਇ ਮੁਖ ਊਜਲ ਦਰਬਾਰਿ ॥੩॥
lines.translit: mil saadhoo sang udhaar hoe mukh aoojal darabaar |3|
lines.english: Joining the Saadh Sangat, the Company of the Holy, one is saved, and one's face becomes radiant in the Court of the Lord. ||3||

lines.gurmukhi: ਜੀਵਨ ਰੂਪ ਗੋਪਾਲ ਜਸੁ ਸੰਤ ਜਨਾ ਕੀ ਰਾਸਿ ॥
lines.translit: jeevan roop gopaal jas sant janaa kee raas |
lines.english: The Praise of the Sustainer of the Universe is the essence of life, and the wealth of His Saints.

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਾਨਕ ਉਬਰੇ ਨਾਮੁ ਜਪਿ ਦਰਿ ਸਚੈ ਸਾਬਾਸਿ ॥੪॥੩॥੧੭੧॥
lines.translit: naanak ubare naam jap dar sachai saabaas |4|3|171|
lines.english: Nanak is saved, chanting the Naam, the Name of the Lord; in the True Court, he is cheered and applauded. ||4||3||171||

lines.gurmukhi: ਗਉੜੀ ਮਾਝ ਮਹਲਾ ੫ ॥
lines.translit: gaurree maajh mahalaa 5 |
lines.english: Gauree Maajh, Fifth Mehl:

lines.gurmukhi: ਮੀਠੇ ਹਰਿ ਗੁਣ ਗਾਉ ਜਿੰਦੂ ਤੂੰ ਮੀਠੇ ਹਰਿ ਗੁਣ ਗਾਉ ॥
lines.translit: meetthe har gun gaau jindoo toon meetthe har gun gaau |
lines.english: Sing the Sweet Praises of the Lord, O my soul, sing the Sweet Praises of the Lord.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਚੇ ਸੇਤੀ ਰਤਿਆ ਮਿਲਿਆ ਨਿਥਾਵੇ ਥਾਉ ॥੧॥ ਰਹਾਉ ॥
lines.translit: sache setee ratiaa miliaa nithaave thaau |1| rahaau |
lines.english: Attuned to the True One, even the homeless find a home. ||1||Pause||

lines.gurmukhi: ਹੋਰਿ ਸਾਦ ਸਭਿ ਫਿਕਿਆ ਤਨੁ ਮਨੁ ਫਿਕਾ ਹੋਇ ॥
lines.translit: hor saad sabh fikiaa tan man fikaa hoe |
lines.english: All other tastes are bland and insipid; through them, the body and mind are rendered insipid as well.

lines.gurmukhi: ਅੰਚਲੁ ਗਹਿ ਕੈ ਸਾਧ ਕਾ ਤਰਣਾ ਇਹੁ ਸੰਸਾਰੁ ॥
lines.translit: anchal geh kai saadh kaa taranaa ihu sansaar |
lines.english: Grasping the hem of the robe of the Holy Saint, we cross over the world-ocean.

lines.gurmukhi: ਵਿਣੁ ਪਰਮੇਸਰ ਜੋ ਕਰੇ ਫਿਟੁ ਸੁ ਜੀਵਣੁ ਸੋਇ ॥੧॥
lines.translit: vin paramesar jo kare fitt su jeevan soe |1|
lines.english: Without the Transcendent Lord, what can anyone do? Cursed is his life, and cursed his reputation. ||1||

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਾਜਨੁ ਬੰਧੁ ਸੁਮਿਤ੍ਰੁ ਸੋ ਹਰਿ ਨਾਮੁ ਹਿਰਦੈ ਦੇਇ ॥
lines.translit: saajan bandh sumitru so har naam hiradai dee |
lines.english: He is a companion, a relative, and a good friend of mine, who implants the Lord's Name within my heart.

lines.gurmukhi: ਪਾਰਬ੍ਰਹਮੁ ਆਰਾਧੀਐ ਉਧਰੈ ਸਭ ਪਰਵਾਰੁ ॥੨॥
lines.translit: paarabraham aaraadheeai udharai sabh paravaar |2|
lines.english: Worship and adore the Supreme Lord God, and all your family will be saved as well. ||2||

lines.gurmukhi: ਅਉਗਣ ਸਭਿ ਮਿਟਾਇ ਕੈ ਪਰਉਪਕਾਰੁ ਕਰੇਇ ॥੩॥
lines.translit: aaugan sabh mittaae kai praupakaar karee |3|
lines.english: He washes off all my demerits, and is so generous to me. ||3||

lines.gurmukhi: ਮਾਲੁ ਖਜਾਨਾ ਥੇਹੁ ਘਰੁ ਹਰਿ ਕੇ ਚਰਣ ਨਿਧਾਨ ॥
lines.translit: maal khajaanaa thehu ghar har ke charan nidhaan |
lines.english: Wealth, treasures, and household are all just ruins; the Lord's Feet are the only treasure.

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਾਨਕੁ ਜਾਚਕੁ ਦਰਿ ਤੇਰੈ ਪ੍ਰਭ ਤੁਧਨੋ ਮੰਗੈ ਦਾਨੁ ॥੪॥੪॥੧੭੨॥
lines.translit: naanak jaachak dar terai prabh tudhano mangai daan |4|4|172|
lines.english: Nanak is a beggar standing at Your Door, God; he begs for Your charity. ||4||4||172||
